allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
perf: fix 12 performance anti-patterns across encoding pipeline

CompositionStore \(unified from 4 files\):
- Single pair creation per call \(was 3x redundant\)
- Single-lock pattern eliminates double-lookup overhead
- Pre-allocated 1M capacity for forward/reverse/compositions
- Collision handling in unlocked helper method

PairEncodingCascade:
- swap\(\) instead of move in tree reduction \(18 fewer vectors/chunk\)
- Parallel cache merge \(was serialized, 7 threads idle\)

PairEncodingEngine:
- Reusable 262K pair buffer \(was 80+ reallocations/pass\)
- RLE range-based tree building
- Count non-empty chunks before reserving

RLESequence:
- O\(log n\) random access via cached cumulative counts + binary search
- Invalidation on push/clear

Seeder:
- Stream chunks directly to PQputCopyData \(no 4.5x memory concat\)
- Cached connection string at construction

Deleted deprecated files:
- composition_decoder.hpp \(merged into CompositionStore\)
- global_composition_store.hpp \(merged into CompositionStore\)
- thread_local_composition_store.hpp \(merged into CompositionCache\)
- vocabulary.hpp \(functionality in CompositionStore\)
- hilbert_encoder.hpp \(unused\)

All 36,457 assertions pass in 90 test cases.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
